system.blocked_from_joining: <bold>{{target}}</bold> is blocked by owner/admin to join group

promote_admin.greeting_message: Hi everyone! I just became admin 👋

demote_admin.by_you: <bold>{{target}}</bold> is no longer an admin of a group

demote_admin.by_actor: <bold>{{target}}</bold> is no longer an admin of a group

transfer_owner.by_you: You appointed <bold>{{target}}</bold> as the new group owner
transfer_owner.self_promoted: You are now the group owner
transfer_owner.card_title: You have been appointed as the new group owner

transfer_owner.greeting_message: Hi everyone! I just became the group owner 👋

disbanded.message: The group has been disbanded by the owner.
disbanded.cannotSendMessage: You can no longer send messages to this group

restricted.onlyAdminCanSend: Only <highlight>owner/admins</highlight> can send messages to this group.
restricted.cannotRename: Only owner/admins can rename this group
restricted.cannotChangeAvatar: Only owner/admins can change the group avatar

errors.adminDeleteTimeExceeded: You can only delete messages on the recipient's device within 24 hours

create-group-dialog.title: Create Group
create-group-dialog.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone number, etc.
create-group-dialog.confirmCancelDescription: Do you want to cancel creating this group?

rename-group-dialog.title: Set group name
rename-group-dialog.description: Are you sure you want to rename this group? A new group name will be visible to all members.

group-info-dialog.title: Group Info
group-info-dialog.noMedia: No shared image in this group
group-info-dialog.adminOnlyBanner: Only Adminstrators can access these settings

permissions.pinNotePoll: Pin messages, notes, and polls to the top of a conversation

toggles.allowNewMembersReadRecent: Allow new members to read most recent messages

group-info-dialog.joinQuestionDesc: New members must answer this question to send a join request.
group-info-dialog.joinQuestionRequiredDesc: Members cannot send requests if left blank
group-info-dialog.joinQuestionEmpty: No join question setup for new members

toggleTooltips.reviewNewMembers: When enabled, new members must be approved by owner or admins to join the group.
toggleTooltips.highlightAdminMessages: When enabled, messages from owner or admin will have a key symbol.
toggleTooltips.allowNewMembersReadRecent: New members can see the entire message history when they join.
toggleTooltips.allowJoinByLink: All members can invite people to join the group by sharing a link with them.

disbandDialog.title: Disband group
disbandDialog.description: Remove all members and delete the group? This CANNOT be undone.

leaveDialog.title: Leave group and delete chat
leaveDialog.description: You will no longer be able to view messages in this group after leaving.
leaveDialog.silentDescription: Only owner/admins will know that you left.
leaveDialog.blockGroupAddTitle: Block from being added to this group
leaveDialog.blockGroupAddDescription: Others must invite you via link

transferOwnerDialog.title: Select a new group owner before leaving
transferOwnerDialog.description: You need to transfer ownership to another member before leaving the group.

actions.blockedMembersDesc: Blocked users cannot rejoin the group, unless they are unblocked or added by the group owner or admins.

refreshJoinLinkDialog.title: Confirm
refreshJoinLinkDialog.description: The current link will become invalid. Change the link?

disableLinkDialog.title: Disable join link
disableLinkDialog.description: Once disabled, people will no longer be able to join the group via this link. Are you sure you want to disable it?

transferOwnerWarning.title: Transfer group owner
transferOwnerWarning.description: Selected person will become group owner and have all management rights. You will lose management rights but still be a group member. This action cannot be undone.

transferOwnerFinal.title: Confirm new owner selection
transferOwnerFinal.description: After change, {{name}} will become the new owner and you will become a normal member.

join-group-dialog.title: Group Info
join-group-dialog.waiting_room: You're in the waiting room. Join to chat with everyone in the group.
join-group-dialog.link_invalid_desc: This link does not exist or has been deleted.
join-group-dialog.link_disabled_desc: The group admin has disabled joining via link.
join-group-dialog.error_desc: Unable to load group info. Please try again later.
join-group-dialog.request_pending_toast: Your request has been sent to owner and admins for approval
join-group-dialog.request_pending_desc: Your request to join the group is pending approval.
join-group-dialog.already_member: You are already a member of this group
join-group-dialog.blocked_from_group: You were blocked by admin from joining this group.
join-group-dialog.approval_required_desc: Membership approval is enabled for this group. You need to answer the following question to send a join request.

sidebarInfo.title: Chat Information
